qtype: identification of number types (multiples, square numbers, primes)
tex:

32   33   34   35   36   37   38   39

(b) a square number,

(c) a prime number.
\newline

tex:

tex:
The table shows the amount of money, $x$, given to a charity by each of 60 people.
\newline

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
Amount ($x$) & Frequency \\
\hline
$0 \leq x < 20$ & 21 \\
$20 \leq x < 25$ & 16 \\
$25 \leq x < 35$ & 6 \\
$35 \leq x < 50$ & 10 \\
$50 \leq x < 100$ & 7 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

Calculate an estimate of the mean.
\newline

tex:
Paddy and Anna each invest \$2000 for 5 years.
\newline
 Paddy earns simple interest at a rate of 1.25\% per year.
\newline
 Anna earns compound interest at a rate of $r\%$ per year.
\newline
 At the end of 5 years, Paddy's investment is worth the same as Anna's investment.
\newline

Calculate the value of $r$.
\newline

stem.content:
Paddy and Anna each invest \$2000 for 5 years.
\newline
 Paddy earns simple interest at a rate of 1.25\% per year.
\newline
 Anna earns compound interest at a rate of $r\%$ per year.
\newline
 At the end of 5 years, Paddy's investment is worth the same as Anna's investment.
\newline

Calculate the value of $r$.
\newline

_rawBody:
Paddy and Anna each invest \$2000 for 5 years. Paddy earns simple interest at a rate of 1.25\% per year. Anna earns compound interest at a rate of $r\%$ per year. At the end of 5 years, Paddy's investment is worth the same as Anna's investment.

Calculate the value of $r$.

\AnswerLine[][\%]
\Marks{5}

tex:
(a) In a class of 40 students:
(b) 28 wear glasses ($G$)

(c) 13 have driving lessons ($D$)

(d) 4 do not wear glasses and do not have driving lessons

(i) Complete the Venn diagram.
\newline

(ii) Use set notation to describe the region that contains a total of 32 students.
\newline

This Venn diagram shows information about the number of students who play basketball ($B$), football ($F$) and hockey ($H$):

\begin{tabular}{ccc}
& $B$ & \\
2 & 7 & 6 \\
& 5 & \\
3 & & 4 \\
& 8 & $H$ \\
& & 12 \\
\end{tabular}

Find $n((B \cup F) \cap H')$.
\newline

Shade the region $P \cap (Q \cup R)'$.
\newline

content.content: 4 do not wear glasses and do not have driving lessons

tex:

 AB = 11 cm and AV = 18.6 cm.
\newline

Calculate the angle that AV makes with the base.
\newline

tex:
O is the origin and OPQR is a parallelogram.
\newline
 SOP is a straight line with SO = OP.
\newline
 TRQ is a straight line with TR = RQ.
\newline

\newline
 $\overrightarrow{OR} = \mathbf{a}$ and $\overrightarrow{OP} = \mathbf{b}$.
\newline

(a) Find, in terms of $\mathbf{a}$ and $\mathbf{b}$, in its simplest form,

(i) (b) the position vector of T,

(c) $\overrightarrow{RV}$.
\newline

(d) Show that PT is parallel to RV.
\newline

\newline
